name: Runwhen
description: Digital assistant platform for SREs that automatically runs troubleshooting tasks and playbooks across Kubernetes and cloud.

seo.title: Runwhen — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Runwhen: Digital assistant platform for SREs that automatically runs troubleshooting tasks and playbooks across Kubernetes and cloud.

when_to_use: SRE digital assistant running diagnostic commands
Codified runbooks triggered by alert conditions
Cloud resource remediation without manual SSH access

pros: Chat-driven diagnostics across Kubernetes and cloud
Reduces MTTR for common recurring issues
cons: Requires investment to build playbook library
Impact depends on existing runbook quality
review.verdict: Useful SRE automation concept, but ROI hinges on how much runbook work you're willing to codify.
review.best_for: SRE teams with recurring incident patterns wanting to automate diagnostics.
review.not_for: Small teams without existing runbooks or standardized troubleshooting.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
